<!-- GENERATED from examples/*.txtar by cmd/gsx-examples — do not edit. -->

```gsx
package views

component Page(title string) {
	<!DOCTYPE html>
	<html lang="en">
		<head>
			<title>{ title }</title>
		</head>
		<body>hi</body>
	</html>
}
```

Renders:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><title>Home</title></head><body>hi</body></html>
```
